data.body: LIVE DIG VALIDATION (post-implementation, exhaustive for the new functionality): (1) bridge-probe PASS — create/label/property/search/delete through the rewritten _run_acli chokepoint. (2) FORCED real-acli timeout (sub-second) -> AcliTimeoutError raised + process-group reap killed the REAL acli process tree, ZERO orphaned acli/java (validates the reap on the actual binary, not just spike fakes). (3) Pass-2 pre-create existence-check SKIP -> re-applying an existing Blocks link gave links_applied=0, NO duplicate link in Jira. All probe issues cleaned up. The dev rebar is the editable working-tree install (AcliTimeoutError/reap/REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT confirmed loaded).
